deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: HDAs
deck.outline:
1. What are HDAs? - HDAs stands for High-Density Arrays, a critical technology in modern data storage.
2. Core Functionality and Benefits - HDAs provide high-capacity storage solutions optimized for performance and density.
3. Summary and Next Steps - HDAs represent a significant advancement in storage technology; consult technical documentation for implementation details.

slide-01.intent: Introduce the topic and define the acronym HDA
slide-01.layoutHint: Simple title slide with high-contrast text on a neutral background.
slide-01.mustInclude: HDAs stands for High-Density Arrays, a critical technology in modern data storage.
slide-01.notes: None required; definition is general knowledge.
slide-01.title: What are HDAs?

slide-02.intent: Explain the practical function and benefits of HDAs
slide-02.layoutHint: Diagram or icon set illustrating data density and storage efficiency.
slide-02.mustInclude: HDAs provide high-capacity storage solutions optimized for performance and density.
slide-02.notes: Focus on the practical function and benefits of HDAs as high-capacity storage solutions optimized for performance and density.
slide-02.title: Core Functionality and Benefits

slide-03.intent: Summarize key takeaways and provide direction for further learning
slide-03.layoutHint: Contact information or resource links displayed with high-contrast text.
slide-03.mustInclude: HDAs represent a significant advancement in storage technology; consult technical documentation for implementation details.
slide-03.notes: Final handoff slide summarizing key takeaways and providing direction for further learning.
slide-03.title: Summary and Next Steps
